de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation

Class TextualJMLClassInv

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLConstruct
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLClassInv

  • public final class TextualJMLClassInv
extends TextualJMLConstruct
    A JML class invariant declaration in textual form.
